summary: Sparse review noting a massive Stella Blue; recording quality unclear
review: The lone reviewer highlights an especially long rendition of "Stella Blue," but provides no details on the audio source or overall performance. With a zero‑star rating and no technical commentary, both the show and recording assessments remain uncertain.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review with a 0‑star rating; while the comment about Stella Blue is mildly positive, the lack of information on performance and sound quality limits confidence.
